Product Details
KTR Couplings

Torsionally flexible coupling solutions for torque transmission, vibration damping, and shaft misalignment compensation.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

KTR Couplings

A practical transmission component for motors, pumps, gearboxes, and general machinery that require flexible shaft connection.

CHX KTR Couplings focus on compact torsionally flexible designs that transmit torque while damping vibration and compensating for axial, radial, and angular displacement.

Torque Transmission

Supports dependable power transfer across a wide range of general industrial drives.

Vibration Damping

The elastomer coupling concept helps reduce torsional vibration and running noise.

Misalignment Compensation

Can accommodate axial, radial, and angular shaft displacement within practical operating ranges.
